text.title: Reasoning-First Architectures — Procedure
text.summary: Six steps: cluster task types → label hard set → eval routing → set per-bucket budgets → wire fall-through + gate → ship + monitor.

step.name: cluster-task-types
step.action: Cluster by intent and surface ≥2 task_types. Tag each cluster with a tentative budget bucket (format / analysis / planning / research).
step.decision-gate: If only one cluster — STOP; this methodology assumes ≥2 task types worth routing differently.

step.name: label-hard-set
step.action: Have SME mark each task as easy/hard with rationale. "Hard" means standard model failed an internal check or SME considered it non-trivial.
step.decision-gate: If <10% labelled "hard" — reasoning routing probably not worth it; consider better prompting on standard model first.

step.name: eval-routing
step.action: Run both standard and reasoning routes against the labelled set. Compute reasoning_lift = (reasoning_pass_rate - standard_pass_rate) per task type.
step.decision-gate: If reasoning_lift < agreed threshold (typical: +5% pass) — STOP; do not adopt reasoning routing for this task type (r1-eval-before-spend).

step.name: set-per-bucket-budgets
step.input: eval data + thinking-token usage per request
step.action: Set `thinking_budget` per task-type bucket to p95 of observed-during-eval usage. Never set a single global value.
step.decision-gate: If any budget <1024 for planning/research task type — flag as under-budgeted (r2-task-type-budget).

step.name: wire-fallthrough-and-gate
step.input: budget cap from finance + irreversible-action list from product
step.action: Wire fall-through to standard model on (a) budget cap hit, (b) reasoning provider health-check fail. Wire human gate before any irreversible downstream action.
step.output: Routing layer live with fall-through + gate logic
step.decision-gate: If fall-through path untested in pre-prod — drill it with synthetic 5xx; do not ship unverified (r5-fall-through-on-budget-cap).

step.name: ship-and-monitor
step.action: Roll out at 5% → 25% → 100% over a week. Log per-request: route chosen, thinking-tokens used, confidence score, downstream outcome.
step.decision-gate: If cost-per-task spikes >2x projection — pause rollout; re-check classifier and budget calibration.
